nodes.name: Day 1
nodes.description: POI: YYZ Airport Arrival - Flight lands at Toronto Pearson International Airport. Long journey from overseas, feeling tired and jet-lagged.; POI: Harbourfront Stroll - Easy, relaxing walk along the wa
nodes.premise: Day: Day 1 - POI: YYZ Airport Arrival - Flight lands at Toronto Pearson International Airport. Long journey from overseas, feeling tired and jet-lagged.; POI: Harbourfront Stroll - Easy, relaxing walk along the waterfront. Low-energy activity perfect for recovering from travel_method. Beautiful lake views and fresh air.; Restaurant: Canoe Restaurant - Upscale Canadian cuisine on the 54th floor of TD Tower. Expensive fine dining with panoramic city views. Elegant and formal atmosphere.; POI: P.J. O'Brien's Pub - Lively Irish-style pub featuring regular live music sessions, a wide beer selection, and casual late-night pub fare — a relaxed spot to end the day.

nodes.name: Day 2
nodes.description: POI: Quick Hotel Breakfast (Lobby Restaurant) - Quick hotel breakfast with coffee, pastries, yogurt, fresh fruit and hot options. Can be eaten in the hotel restaurant or grabbed to go for the short wa
nodes.premise: Day: Day 2 - POI: Quick Hotel Breakfast (Lobby Restaurant) - Quick hotel breakfast with coffee, pastries, yogurt, fresh fruit and hot options. Can be eaten in the hotel restaurant or grabbed to go for the short walk to the meeting.; POI: Client Kickoff Meeting - Formal business meeting at TD Tower with key stakeholders. High-pressure work presentation and strategy discussion. Professional corporate environment.; POI: Strategy Workshop - Intensive afternoon workshop session with the team. Long work hours in conference room. Mentally draining but productive.; Restaurant: Alo Restaurant - Three Michelin-starred French tasting menu. Extremely expensive and exclusive fine dining. Intimate 8-course experience with wine pairings. Very formal and upscale.

nodes.name: Day 3
nodes.description: Restaurant: Hotel Continental Breakfast - Quick breakfast at the hotel restaurant. Simple continental options, nothing special but convenient.; POI: Stakeholder Presentation - Morning work session pre
nodes.premise: Day: Day 3 - Restaurant: Hotel Continental Breakfast - Quick breakfast at the hotel restaurant. Simple continental options, nothing special but convenient.; POI: Stakeholder Presentation - Morning work session presenting quarterly results to stakeholders. High-pressure meeting requiring focus and preparation.; POI: Fika Coffee Bar (near AGO) - Short coffee break at a nearby café with quick service, specialty coffee and light pastries — convenient stop before the Art Gallery visit.; POI: Art Gallery of Ontario - World-class art museum with Canadian and international collections. Indoor cultural experience in Frank Gehry-designed building. Quiet and contemplative atmosphere.; Restaurant: FRANK Restaurant at AGO - Modern Canadian cuisine inside the Art Gallery. Artistic setting with creative seasonal menu.; Restaurant: Pai Northern Thai - Popular Thai restaurant known for authentic northern Thai cuisine. Lively atmosphere with bold flavors. Asian food option.

nodes.name: Day 4
nodes.description: Restaurant: Quick Grab Coffee - Fast coffee and pastry from Tim Hortons. Rushed morning before intense work day.; POI: Full-Day Workshop - Intensive all-day work workshop with the entire team. Exhaust
nodes.premise: Day: Day 4 - Restaurant: Quick Grab Coffee - Fast coffee and pastry from Tim Hortons. Rushed morning before intense work day.; POI: Full-Day Workshop - Intensive all-day work workshop with the entire team. Exhausting but productive session covering project roadmap and deliverables.; POI: Bloor Street Shopping - Optional shopping trip along Bloor-Yorkville luxury district. High-end boutiques and designer stores.; Restaurant: Lee Restaurant - Susur Lee's flagship Asian fusion restaurant. Creative dishes blending East and West. Trendy atmosphere with innovative cuisine.

nodes.name: Day 5
nodes.description: Restaurant: Mildred's Temple Kitchen - Popular brunch spot in Liberty Village. Famous for pancakes and weekend atmosphere. Trendy and casual.; Restaurant: Kaiseki Kaji - Exquisite Japanese kaiseki din
nodes.premise: Day: Day 5 - Restaurant: Mildred's Temple Kitchen - Popular brunch spot in Liberty Village. Famous for pancakes and weekend atmosphere. Trendy and casual.; Restaurant: Kaiseki Kaji - Exquisite Japanese kaiseki dining experience. Very expensive omakase with seasonal courses. Intimate and formal setting.

nodes.name: Day 6
nodes.description: Restaurant: Sunset Grill - Family-friendly breakfast chain with classic options. Good for kids with simple menu and quick service.; POI: Toronto Islands Ferry and Bike Ride - Ferry ride to Toronto Isl
nodes.premise: Day: Day 6 - Restaurant: Sunset Grill - Family-friendly breakfast chain with classic options. Good for kids with simple menu and quick service.; POI: Toronto Islands Ferry and Bike Ride - Ferry ride to Toronto Islands followed by bike rental and exploration. Outdoor nature activity with beaches, gardens, and stunning skyline views. Perfect for families and kids.; Restaurant: Island Cafe Picnic Lunch - Casual picnic-style lunch on Centre Island. Sandwiches and snacks from the island cafe. Relaxed outdoor dining.; POI: Ripley's Aquarium - World-class aquarium with underwater tunnel and interactive exhibits. Indoor family attraction perfect for kids. Sharks, jellyfish, and touch tanks.; Restaurant: The Keg Steakhouse - Classic steakhouse with something for everyone. Family-friendly atmosphere with reliable menu. Good for groups.

nodes.name: Day 7
nodes.description: Restaurant: Fran's Restaurant - Classic Toronto diner serving breakfast all day. Casual and unpretentious with hearty portions.; POI: Royal Ontario Museum - World-renowned museum showcasing art, cultu
nodes.premise: Day: Day 7 - Restaurant: Fran's Restaurant - Classic Toronto diner serving breakfast all day. Casual and unpretentious with hearty portions.; POI: Royal Ontario Museum - World-renowned museum showcasing art, culture, and natural history. Indoor cultural experience with dinosaurs, gems, and world cultures exhibits.; Restaurant: Eataly Toronto - Italian marketplace and restaurant in Manulife Centre. Indoor dining with fresh pasta, pizza, and espresso. Great for rainy day lunch.; Restaurant: Cluny Bistro - French-inspired bistro in the Distillery District. Romantic and intimate atmosphere with classic dishes and excellent wine list.

nodes.name: Day 8
nodes.description: Restaurant: Elements on the Falls - Dining with direct view of Niagara Falls. Tourist location but unbeatable views. Part of the day trip package.; Restaurant: Antler Kitchen - Canadian game meat rest
nodes.premise: Day: Day 8 - Restaurant: Elements on the Falls - Dining with direct view of Niagara Falls. Tourist location but unbeatable views. Part of the day trip package.; Restaurant: Antler Kitchen - Canadian game meat restaurant featuring locally sourced venison, bison, and seasonal ingredients. Unique dining experience with rustic atmosphere.

nodes.name: Day 9
nodes.description: Restaurant: Lady Marmalade - Popular brunch spot in Leslieville known for creative breakfast dishes and great coffee. Trendy neighborhood vibe.; POI: Eaton Centre Shopping - Major downtown shopping ma
nodes.premise: Day: Day 9 - Restaurant: Lady Marmalade - Popular brunch spot in Leslieville known for creative breakfast dishes and great coffee. Trendy neighborhood vibe.; POI: Eaton Centre Shopping - Major downtown shopping mall with hundreds of stores. Indoor shopping for souvenirs, clothing, and gifts. Climate-controlled and convenient.; Restaurant: Urban Eatery Food Court - Food court in Eaton Centre with diverse quick options. Fast and convenient but generic mall food.; POI: Queen Street West Boutiques - Eclectic shopping district with independent boutiques, vintage stores, and Canadian designers. Outdoor walking and browsing experience.; Restaurant: Bar Isabel - Spanish tapas bar with lively atmosphere. Great for sharing plates and celebrating. Intimate and buzzy.

nodes.name: Day 10
nodes.description: Restaurant: Hotel Quick Checkout Breakfast - Fast breakfast before checkout. Simple pastries and coffee from hotel lobby. Rushed but necessary.; POI: Souvenir Stop — Roots or Hudson's Bay Flagship - Q
nodes.premise: Day: Day 10 - Restaurant: Hotel Quick Checkout Breakfast - Fast breakfast before checkout. Simple pastries and coffee from hotel lobby. Rushed but necessary.; POI: Souvenir Stop — Roots or Hudson's Bay Flagship - Quick gift and souvenir shopping stop. Option to visit Roots for Canadian apparel and small gift items, or Hudson's Bay flagship for a wider selection of souvenirs, home goods, and premium gifts. Short visit aimed at grabbing last-minute presents before other activities and the flight.; POI: Airport Snack Stop - Generic airport food and coffee before boarding. Forgettable but necessary. Nothing special about airport dining.; POI: Budget Dinner near YYZ (Terminal Food Court) - Quick, budget-friendly dinner option near Toronto Pearson (terminal food court or nearby fast-casual spot). Ideal for a light meal—sandwiches, salads, or grab-and-go hot items—before heading to the gate.; POI: YYZ Departure - Flight departure from Toronto Pearson International Airport. End of trip.
